summary: Iteration 12 — Frontend-only verification of SuperAdminDashboard refactor (OverviewTab + StaffPerfTab extraction) and new Duplicate-product feature. ALL frontend acceptance criteria PASS. Overview panel and StaffPerf empty state render correctly from self-fetching components. All 7 admin tabs switch cleanly. Products tab shows 3-icon row (Dup/Edit/Del) with correct data-testids. Duplicate flow pre-fills form with name + ' (Copy)', preserves price/category/image, button reads 'Create Product', POST succeeds, product list refreshes (+1). Test-created duplicate cleaned up via DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} -> 200. Both yash@masterliqours.my (super_admin) and jojo@masterliqours.my (master_admin) can access /admin. No console errors blocking flows (one benign 401 on initial /admin load — likely a tab-prefetch race, non-blocking).

minor.issue: One 401 console error logged on first /admin load. Did not affect any acceptance criterion. Likely a non-admin endpoint being hit before role check or before cookie is fully applied. Worth a glance but non-blocking.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate the single 401 observed on /admin load (low priority, non-blocking).
OPTIONAL (from iter11, still open): Rename TABS id 'banners' -> 'hero-banners' for testid consistency, OR update review-request spec to match current 'admin-tab-banners'. Cosmetic only.
critical_code_review_comments: OverviewTab.js (86 lines): Clean extraction. Self-fetches /api/admin/analytics + /api/admin/all-orders in parallel. Uses STAT_CARDS array for DRY rendering of 4 cards. Has data-testid='admin-overview-panel' and per-card testids. Loading state and empty states present. Good.

StaffPerfTab.js (106 lines): Clean. Self-fetches /api/admin/staff-performance. Handles empty state with FaTrophy + 'No staff yet boss.' text inside data-testid='admin-staff-perf-panel' as required. Populated state has summary cards and per-staff breakdown table.

SuperAdminDashboard.js line 67: useEffect calls load() on every tab change, but load() correctly no-ops for 'overview' and 'staff-perf' tabs (those are handled by their own components). Clean separation.

duplicateProduct() in SuperAdminDashboard.js (lines 142-155): Correctly sets editingProduct=null, prefills with `${p.name} (Copy)`, preserves price/description/category/image_url/is_active, opens form and smooth-scrolls to top. Verified end-to-end: POST /api/admin/products is called (NOT PATCH), product list refreshes via load().

Three-button row in Products tab (lines 392-401): Order is [Duplicate (yellow hover #ffd700), Edit (cyan hover #00f0ff), Delete (pink hover #ff007f)] — matches spec. Each has unique data-testid suffixed by product_id. FaCopy icon used for Duplicate.

Product form save button label correctly toggles between 'Update Product' (editingProduct truthy) and 'Create Product' (editingProduct=null) — verified in DOM (rendered as 'CREATE PRODUCT' due to CSS uppercase on btn-lime; underlying string is 'Create Product').

File size: SuperAdminDashboard.js still 707 lines — still above the soft 700-line guideline but acceptable after the Overview+StaffPerf extraction (dropped from 853). Banners/Products/Brands/FlashSales/Staff tabs share parent form state so further extraction is non-trivial; can be deferred.

Note on test-string comparisons: page.inner_text() returns CSS-rendered text (uppercase via text-transform). Future tests should compare against page.input_value() for inputs and use case-insensitive comparison for rendered labels.

success_rate.backend: not tested in this iteration (frontend-only as requested)

test_credentials: Yash: yash@masterliqours.my / Admin123! (super_admin), Jojo: jojo@masterliqours.my / Admin123! (master_admin) — both verified working
seed_data_creation: Created 1 duplicate product 'Chardonnay White Wine (Copy)' (product_id=4b9cb061-8119-4ce0-b419-14f5422d54df) during test and DELETED it via DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} -> 200. Final product count returned to 28 (initial state).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter12 frontend verification of admin refactor + Duplicate-product feature PASSED. All 7 admin tabs work; data-testids match spec EXCEPT Hero Banners is 'admin-tab-banners' (id='banners' in TABS array, not 'hero-banners' — carryover from iter11). The Duplicate button uses data-testid='admin-product-dup-<product_id>' with FaCopy icon and yellow hover. duplicateProduct() handler in SuperAdminDashboard.js sets editingProduct=null so the form behaves like Add (POST). When testing inner_text, beware CSS uppercase transform: prefer input_value() for input fields and case-insensitive compare for button labels. Backend was NOT tested this iteration (per request: frontend-only); iter11 confirmed 100% backend pass.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs encountered. Feature works as specified.
